tags.name: if
tags.signature: {% if expr %}…{% elif expr %}…{% else %}…{% endif %}
tags.description: Conditional rendering. Supports `elif` and `else`.

tags.name: elif
tags.description: Branch of an `if` statement.

tags.name: else
tags.description: Fallback branch of an `if` or `for` statement.

tags.name: endif
tags.description: Closes an `if` block.

tags.name: for
tags.signature: {% for x in iterable %}…{% else %}…{% endfor %}
tags.description: Iterate over an array or map. The `else` branch runs when the iterable is empty. Inside the loop, `loop.index`, `loop.index0`, `loop.first`, `loop.last` are available.

tags.name: endfor
tags.description: Closes a `for` block.

tags.name: break
tags.description: Exit the nearest enclosing `for` loop.

tags.name: continue
tags.description: Skip to the next iteration of the nearest enclosing `for` loop.

tags.name: set
tags.description: Bind a value to a name in the current scope.

tags.name: set_global
tags.description: Bind a value at the template's global scope (usable inside loops and macros).

tags.name: block
tags.description: Declare a named block that child templates can override.

tags.name: endblock
tags.description: Closes a `block`. The block name may be repeated for clarity.

tags.name: extends
tags.description: Declare this template inherits from a parent template.

tags.name: include
tags.description: Render another template inline at this position.

tags.name: import
tags.description: Import macros from another template under a namespace.

tags.name: macro
tags.description: Define a reusable macro. Call as `{{ self::name() }}` or via namespace after `import`.

tags.name: endmacro
tags.description: Closes a `macro` definition.

tags.name: filter
tags.description: Apply a filter to a block of rendered content.

tags.name: endfilter
tags.description: Closes a `filter` block.

tags.name: raw
tags.description: Disable template parsing inside the block. Useful for emitting literal `{{` / `{%`.

tags.name: endraw
tags.description: Closes a `raw` block.

filters.name: lower
filters.description: Convert a string to lowercase.

filters.name: upper
filters.description: Convert a string to uppercase.

filters.name: capitalize
filters.description: Uppercase the first character; lowercase the rest.

filters.name: title
filters.description: Capitalize the first letter of every word.

filters.name: upper_first
filters.description: Uppercase the first character only. (Available in git-cliff Tera context.)

filters.name: trim
filters.description: Remove leading and trailing whitespace.

filters.name: trim_start
filters.description: Remove leading whitespace.

filters.name: trim_end
filters.description: Remove trailing whitespace.

filters.name: trim_start_matches
filters.description: Remove the given prefix repeatedly from the start.

filters.name: trim_end_matches
filters.description: Remove the given suffix repeatedly from the end.

filters.name: truncate
filters.description: Truncate a string to `length` characters, appending `end` when truncated.

filters.name: replace
filters.description: Replace all occurrences of `from` with `to`.

filters.name: striptags
filters.description: Strip HTML/XML tags from a string.

filters.name: linebreaksbr
filters.description:
Convert newlines into `
` tags.

filters.name: indent
filters.description: Indent each line with `prefix`. Set `first=true` to also indent the first line.

filters.name: spaceless
filters.description: Remove whitespace between HTML tags.

filters.name: urlencode
filters.description: Percent-encode a string for use in a URL.

filters.name: urlencode_strict
filters.description: Percent-encode a string, also encoding `/`.

filters.name: escape
filters.description: HTML-escape a string (`&` → `&`, etc.). Aliased as `e`.

filters.name: escape_xml
filters.description: XML-escape a string.

filters.name: safe
filters.description: Mark a value as safe so the autoescaper won't escape it.

filters.name: json_encode
filters.description: Serialize a value as JSON. Aliased as `as_json`.

filters.name: as_str
filters.description: Coerce a value to its string representation.

filters.name: int
filters.description: Parse a value as an integer.

filters.name: float
filters.description: Parse a value as a float.

filters.name: round
filters.description: Round a number. `method` is `common`, `ceil`, or `floor`.

filters.name: abs
filters.description: Absolute value of a number.

filters.name: filesizeformat
filters.description: Format a byte count as a human-readable size (e.g. `1.2 KB`).

filters.name: date
filters.description: Format a unix timestamp or RFC3339 string as a date.

filters.name: length
filters.description: Length of a string, array, or map.

filters.name: reverse
filters.description: Reverse a string or array.

filters.name: sort
filters.description: Sort an array. Use `attribute` to sort an array of objects by a field.

filters.name: unique
filters.description: Deduplicate an array.

filters.name: slice
filters.description: Take a sub-slice of a string or array.

filters.name: first
filters.description: First element of an array (or `null` if empty).

filters.name: last
filters.description: Last element of an array (or `null` if empty).

filters.name: nth
filters.description: Get the `n`-th element of an array (0-indexed).

filters.name: join
filters.description: Join an array of strings into a single string.

filters.name: concat
filters.description: Concatenate arrays together.

filters.name: default
filters.description: Fall back to `value` if the input is missing, null, or empty.

filters.name: map
filters.description: Extract one attribute from each item in an array of objects.

filters.name: filter
filters.description: Keep only items in an array whose `attribute` equals `value`. Pair with `is matching(...)` for regex.

filters.name: group_by
filters.description: Group an array of objects into a map keyed by `attribute`.

filters.name: split
filters.description: Split a string into an array on the given pattern.

filters.name: wordcount
filters.description: Count whitespace-separated words in a string.

filters.name: pluralize
filters.description: Return `singular` if the value is 1, otherwise `plural`. Useful for noun agreement.

filters.name: get
filters.description: Index into a map or object by key.

filters.name: get_random
filters.description: Pick a random element from an array.

filters.name: trim_lines
filters.description: Trim whitespace from every line in a string.

functions.name: range
functions.description: Create a numeric range (array of integers).

functions.name: now
functions.description: Current time. Returns RFC3339 by default; `timestamp=true` returns a unix timestamp.

tests.name: defined
tests.description: True if `x` is bound in the current scope.

tests.name: undefined
tests.description: True if `x` is not bound (or is null).

tests.name: iterable
tests.description: True if `x` is an array or map.

tests.name: odd
tests.description: True if `x` is an odd integer.

tests.name: even
tests.description: True if `x` is an even integer.

tests.name: matching
tests.description: True if `x` matches the given regex.

tests.name: containing
tests.description: True if `x` contains the given substring (string) or value (array).

tests.name: starting_with
tests.description: True if a string starts with the given prefix.

tests.name: ending_with
tests.description: True if a string ends with the given suffix.
